channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Knicks set NBA playoff record for best point differential during championship run
item.description: The New York Knicks achieved the highest point differential in playoff history during their 2026 NBA Championship run. Mike Vorkunov reports.

item.title: Gavin Newsom says DOJ is investigating him and his wife
item.description: Newsom claims Trump is targeting him because he is considering a presidential run.

item.title: Oil prices drop, stocks surge after Trump announces Iran deal
item.description: Markets rally on hopes the agreement will ease global energy supply concerns, though analysts warn gas prices may stay elevated for some time.

item.title: Vance says Iran agreement digitally signed, remains vague on key details
item.description: Vice President JD Vance spoke to ABC News' 'Good Morning America' on Monday.
